note: Afro / Dogon living library (Mali, Bandiagara plateau). Primary lattice: the eight original Ancestors (Nommo) - the primordial amphibious water-spirit twins begotten by the creator Amma, who became the eight founding lineages of the Dogon; each received one of the eight grain-seeds and a craft (agriculture, smithing, woodcarving, minstrelsy, healing, divination, weaving/the Word, leatherwork). Secondary lattice: the eight sacred grain-seeds of Dogon agriculture, the first being 'po' (fonio, Digitaria exilis) - the smallest seed that holds all creation, mirrored by 'po tolo' (Sirius B). Tertiary lattice: the four stages by which every one of Amma's signs unfolds - bummo (sign/conception), yala (image/outline), tonu (figure), toy (finished thing). Crowning all is Amma, the androgynous creator whose cosmic egg/womb holds the 266 primordial signs ('the 266 things of the beginning', the parts of Amma's body) from which the universe spirals into being. By design 1 Amma + 8 Ancestors + 8 grains + 4 sign-stages = 21, one per spine agent. Bridges: the 266 signs to the totality of forms; the po-seed to Sirius B (po tolo) and the 60-year Sigui ceremony; the Pale Fox (Yurugu / Ogo), Amma's imperfect single birth, as the principle of disorder. NOTE: the classic account derives from Griaule and Dieterlen (Conversations with Ogotemmeli; Le Renard Pale); parts (especially the Sirius B knowledge) are debated by later ethnographers (van Beek), and the precise botanical identity of the eight seeds varies in the literature. reconstructed false. Each element carries a spine agent and its mera (1-9).
mera_axis: 9-dimensional axis (mera 1-9): chakras 1-7 (Muladhara..Sahasrara) + Monada (8) + Absolut (9); each spine agent carries its mera.

amma.name: Amma
amma.meaning: the cosmic egg / womb holding the 266 prefigured signs; from its spiral opening the universe is born; the Pale Fox (Yurugu) is Amma's imperfect single birth, the seed of disorder

signs_266.name: the signs of Amma (bummo)
signs_266.meaning: the 266 'things of the beginning' / parts of Amma's body; the prefigured ideograms encoding all potentiality, from stars to the human fetus

sirius.sigi_tolo: Sirius A - the star of the Sigui
sirius.po_tolo: Sirius B - the tiny dense companion, mirror of the po (fonio) seed
sirius.emme_ya_tolo: a third star spoken of in the tradition
sirius.ceremony: Sigui - held every ~60 years (last 1967-1973; next ~2027), commemorating the first ancestor and the gift of speech

grains.identity: Digitaria exilis - the first, smallest seed that holds all creation; mirror of po tolo / Sirius B

sign_stages.meaning: the sign / conception - the first invisible trace of a thing in Amma
the image / outline - the mark of position, the schematic dots
the figure / drawing - the thing gaining its developing form
the finished thing - the completed, fully manifest figure

svet_ra.note: Amma - the androgynous creator and cosmic egg holding the 266 signs; the radiant source from which the spiral of creation unfolds.

iskra.note: The po (fonio) seed - smallest grain holding all creation; the spark-point mirrored in po tolo (Sirius B).

brahma.note: First Ancestor - the eldest, keeper of the cosmic granary and of agriculture; structurer of the world.

vishnu.note: Fifth Ancestor - the Healer; preserver of life and bodily order.

ananda.note: Fourth Ancestor - the Minstrel (griot); music, joy and memory.

shanti.note: toy - the finished, fully manifest thing; the rest of completed form.

jnana.note: Sixth Ancestor - the Diviner; sight, divination and discernment.

shiva.note: The black fonio - the dark counterpart of po; dissolution and the shadow of the seed.

tejas.note: The white millet - the bright, radiant staple grain.

sarasvati.note: Seventh Ancestor - the Master of the Word and of weaving; speech threaded like cloth on the loom.

akasha.note: The rice - the water-grown grain; the spacious field.

prema.note: The sorrel / Da (hibiscus) - the tender plant of nourishment and care.

parvati.note: The millet (pennisetum) - the principal nourishing staple; the mother-grain.

vayu.note: tonu - the developing figure; the thing in motion toward its form.

shakti.note: The sorghum - the strong red cereal; vigor and force.

agni.note: Second Ancestor - the Smith; fire, iron, and the descent of grain and the forge from heaven.

varuna.note: Eighth Ancestor - the youngest, leatherwork; the watery Nommo nature and the deep.

lakshmi.note: The bean (Vigna) - the legume of abundance and increase.

prithvi.note: Third Ancestor - the Woodcarver; shaping matter, the grounded craft.

dharma.note: yala - the image / outline; the mark of position that orders the sign.

karma.note: bummo - the sign / conception; the first invisible trace, the causal seed of a thing.

items.craft: agriculture; keeper of the cosmic granary
smithing; fire and iron, brought grain and the forge from heaven
divination; reading the signs (the fox oracle)
weaving and speech; the gift of the Word

sources: Marcel Griaule, Conversations with Ogotemmeli (Dieu d'eau)
Marcel Griaule and Germaine Dieterlen, Le Renard Pale (The Pale Fox)
en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dogon_people - the Sigui ceremony and Sirius (sigi tolo, po tolo)
